title: clarkia tenella subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Clarkia tenella subsp. tenuifolia, also known as the slender clarkia or narrow-leaved clarkia, is a flowering plant species in the evening primrose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clarkia tenella subsp. tenuifolia include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting the respiratory and cardiovascular systems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
